task.summary: [L1-v2] Add doc comment to RemediationPacket struct
task.description: Add a Go doc comment above the RemediationPacket struct in cmd/remediation-worker/main.go.

l1_result.llm_content:
{
  "jira_key": "ZB-868",
  "problem_summary": "Add Go doc comment above RemediationPacket struct in cmd/remediation-worker/main.go",
  "target_files": [
    "cmd/remediation-worker/main.go"
  ],
  "edit_description": "Add 'package main' and 'package github.com/...' doc comments above the struct block to document the package and its imports.",
  "patch_commands": [
    "sed -i '1,/^package main/ { /^package main/ !d; /^package github.com/.../.../main\\.go$/ { /^package github.com/.../.../main\\.go$/ !d; /^package main/ { /^package main/ !d; /^package github.com/.../.../main\\.go$/ { /^package main/ !d; /^package github.com/.../.../main\\.go$/ } } }' cmd/remediation-worker/main.go",
    "echo >> cmd/remediation-worker/main.go"
  ],
  "expected_outcome": "Go doc comments added above the struct block, documenting the package and imports.",
  "risk_notes": "Ensure no syntax errors occur during sed substitution.",
  "follow_up_type": "needs_review"
}
